response.justification: The candidate clears the 15-year experience bar with a broad, hands-on full-stack and systems background, including some low-latency infrastructure work and recent exposure to AI-agent tooling (MCP code generators). However, the role is a director-level strategy position requiring recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products or platforms, and engineering leadership at organizational scale — the resume shows a strong senior/staff IC profile with only about a year of tangential AI infrastructure work and no evidence of strategic advisory, large-scale technical leadership, or AI research credentials.
strengths: 19+ years of hands-on software engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Founder experience (GISCollective) showing entrepreneurial initiative and long-term product ownership
Recent practical exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling
concerns: No recognized AI expertise or demonstrated AI-powered products at the depth the role requires
Career trajectory is senior/staff IC delivery work, not director-level strategy or engineering leadership
No advanced degree in an AI-related field and limited cloud-platform strategy experience

key_factors.factor: AI expertise gap vs. role's core focus
Seniority mismatch for director-level strategy scope
Long, diverse engineering experience with founder background
